message:
feat(airtable): add records CRUD, attachment handling, and webhook automation

- records.rs: Record CRUD, builder pattern, batch ops, pagination (145 tests)
- attachments.rs: AttachmentConfig, URL/filename/MIME validation (110 tests)
- webhooks.rs: HMAC-SHA256 verification, cursor management, lifecycle (115 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
